subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch top 5 publishers by spend in Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec), with total spend, transaction count, and spend trend indicators

Reconcile Q4 spend data with historical publisher performance patterns to classify at-risk status (e.g., declining spend, payment delays, contract expiry risk) and generate SAM team summary with specific risk flags and remediation recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen at mid-tier for the Q4 spend query requiring multi-table joins and window functions to rank publishers and compute trends; (2) cross_recon at mid-tier to reconcile the SQL results with historical state/patterns to identify at-risk signals and deliver the SAM summary. Kept to minimum: the risk classification and recommendation generation are part of cross_recon's reconciliation output, not separate policy_action. Mid-tier for both because sql_gen needs trend calculation and cross_recon needs multi-signal reasoning (spend patterns, contracts, payment health).

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_spend_per_transaction, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-10-31' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date <= '2024-11-30' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'declining' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-10-31' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date <= '2024-11-30' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'growing' ELSE 'stable' END AS spend_trend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

reconciled.sql_value: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_spend_per_transaction, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-10-31' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date <= '2024-11-30' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'declining' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-10-31' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date <= '2024-11-30' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'growing' ELSE 'stable' END AS spend_trend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

output.notes: No MongoDB operational data provided in upstream_outputs; only SQL query definition available. Reconciliation requires executed SQL result rows and MongoDB publisher state to classify at-risk status per publisher.
